TRACLUS 1.0.0

Toy trajectory dataset

Source: R/data.R
traclus_toy.Rd

A small euclidean trajectory dataset for testing and demonstration purposes. Contains 6 trajectories in local km coordinates: five roughly horizontal trajectories (TR1–TR5) with 7 points each and one nearly vertical outlier trajectory (TR6) with 5 points.

Usage

traclus_toy

Format

A data.frame with 40 rows and 3 columns:

traj_id

Character trajectory identifier ("TR1" through "TR6").

x

Numeric x-coordinate.

y

Numeric y-coordinate.

Source

Synthetic data created for the TRACLUS package.

Examples

head(traclus_toy)
#>   traj_id  x y
#> 1     TR1  0 0
#> 2     TR1 10 2
#> 3     TR1 20 4
#> 4     TR1 30 4
#> 5     TR1 40 4
#> 6     TR1 50 8
trj <- tc_trajectories(traclus_toy,
  traj_id = "traj_id",
  x = "x", y = "y", coord_type = "euclidean"
)
#> Loaded 6 trajectories (40 points).
